meta.thesis: AI 智能眼镜真实需求被 Ray-Ban Meta 验证,但下一波竞争不在硬件,在「环境隐私」与「无屏 AI 体验」。
meta.deck: 172 条 raw voice + 18 篇评测显示:用户买的是"摄录 + AI 听",不是 AR。隐私争议是品类天花板,谁先解决谁拿下下一波。
meta.thesis_en: Ray-Ban Meta validates real demand for AI smart glasses, but the next wave of competition is not about hardware, but 'ambient privacy' and 'screenless AI experience'.
meta.deck_en: 172 raw voice clips + 18 reviews show: users buy for 'recording + AI listening', not AR. Privacy controversy is the category ceiling; whoever solves it first wins the next wave.

verdict.rationale: Ray-Ban Meta 单产品 200 万销量已验证消费意愿;但所有竞品都还在抄硬件,没人触及隐私层。
key_findings: Ray-Ban Meta 实际 use case 集中在「摄录朋友」+「AI 听翻译」,不是 AR navigation。
隐私指示灯是争议焦点 —— 用户 + 旁观者两边都不满意,品类天花板。
Meta 之外其他厂家都在做硬件版本,但没有差异化 USP。
Apple Vision 路径太重,反而留出了「轻 AI 眼镜」的窗口。
verdict.rationale_en: Ray-Ban Meta's 2 million unit sales confirm consumer willingness; but all competitors are still copying hardware, none addressing the privacy layer.
key_findings_en: Ray-Ban Meta's actual use cases center on 'recording friends' + 'AI listening/translation', not AR navigation.
Privacy indicator light is a flashpoint — both users and bystanders are dissatisfied, capping the category.
Other manufacturers beyond Meta are making hardware versions, but lack differentiated USP.
Apple Vision's heavy path leaves a window for 'light AI glasses'.

opportunity.label: ★ 环境隐私 + 无屏 AI
opportunity.summary: 可见可感的隐私指示 + 无屏的 AI 听/译/记 = 下一波切入点。没有玩家占据。
opportunity.summary_en: Visible and perceptible privacy indication + screenless AI listening/translation/recording = next entry point. No player occupies it.

paths.label: Path A · 隐私优先 AI 听镜
paths.core: 可见隐私指示 + 无屏 AI 听/译/记
paths.description: 对接最强 voice (摄录 + 翻译) ,绕开隐私争议,有 Meta 不愿做的护城河
paths.label_en: Path A · Privacy-First AI Listening Glasses
paths.core_en: Visible privacy indication + screenless AI listening/translation/recording
paths.description_en: Leverage strongest voice (recording + translation), bypass privacy controversy, create moat Meta is unwilling to build

paths.label: Path B · 高端定制时尚向
paths.core: Even-style 极简 + 时尚品牌联名
paths.description: 走 lifestyle 高端,绕开 Meta 主战场,但天花板低
paths.description_en: Go lifestyle high-end, bypass Meta's main battlefield, but low ceiling

paths.label: Path C · 垂直场景 (商务/医疗)
paths.core: 会议记录 / 看诊辅助
paths.description: B2B 路径,绕开消费市场,但需 GTM 重做
paths.description_en: B2B path, bypass consumer market, but requires GTM rework

risks.title: Apple AI 眼镜入场
risks.scenario: 若 2026-2027 官宣,定义新 baseline
risks.mitigation: 抢隐私 / 听镜定位窗口 · 与 Apple 不重叠
risks.mitigation_en: Seize privacy/listening glasses positioning window · non-overlapping with Apple

risks.title: 隐私监管收紧
risks.scenario: EU / 加州可能立法强制视觉指示灯
risks.mitigation: 主动设计 over-spec 指示灯方案
risks.scenario_en: EU/California may mandate visual indicator lights
risks.mitigation_en: Proactively design over-spec indicator light solution

risks.title: Meta 突然降价
risks.scenario: Ray-Ban Meta 降到 $199 抢平价市场
risks.mitigation: 差异化护城河 · 不做硬件 race-to-bottom
risks.scenario_en: Ray-Ban Meta drops to $199 to capture budget market

risks.title: 电池技术瓶颈
risks.scenario: 续航卡在 2h 无法突破
risks.mitigation: 充电盒 + USB-C 兼容方案
risks.scenario_en: Battery life stuck at 2h, cannot break through

risks.title: AI 翻译质量瓶颈
risks.scenario: Apple/Google 翻译免费 + 集成
risks.mitigation: 聚焦 niche 语种 + 实时性优势
risks.mitigation_en: Focus on niche languages + real-time advantage

failures.name: Google Glass
failures.what: 面向工程师的 AR 探险 · 隐私争议 + 价格
failures.lesson: AR 眼镜如果先解决隐私,产品才能成立
failures.what_en: AR expedition for engineers · privacy controversy + price
failures.lesson_en: AR glasses must solve privacy first to be viable

failures.name: Snap Spectacles
failures.what: Snapchat 摄录眼镜 · 内容生态弱
failures.lesson: 硬件之外的内容生态决定生死
failures.what_en: Snapchat recording glasses · weak content ecosystem
failures.lesson_en: Beyond hardware, content ecosystem determines survival
